title: Status plugin event declarations (events.json)
description: The single source of truth for the events a plugin can emit. Every event type used in mappings.json and rules.presets.json must be declared here. Plugins do not send notifications directly; they suggest defaults, and the core and user preferences decide.

type.description: Dotted lowercase event type, e.g. app.review.rejected.

resourceType.description: Resource type this event attaches to, matching a mappings.json resource type.

notificationDefault.description: Suggested notification mode. The core notification engine and user rules make the final decision.
